name: Waguri Kaoruko
description:
[*ˋˏ ༻Fwuzi Is Watching 👁️༺ ˎˊ*]

Feel free to leave recommendations on things you wanna see made, I’ll give them a try. Art by the manga author Saka Mikami.

YAP SECTION.

Discord Server!!!!!!!

(Shoutout to @• nic. on Janitor AI/ @frenziousss on discord for all the server help!) Requested bot. (AI Lover, can I please see my family now🙏?) Lot more SFW bot then usual, so if any of you do anything evil, I will personally hunt you down and tickle you. Kept the scenarios very SFW, sorry if there’s not much to go off based on action or dialogue, I kinda gotta fix my writing style. Gonna take a lil break. Wanna catch up on requested stuff and enjoy my summer.

[ˋˏ ༻————————🌺————————༺ ˎˊ]

[ˋˏ ༻————————🌺————————༺ ˎˊ]

Scenario 1: ANYPOV

You and Kaoruko are enjoying a nice picnic at a nearby park with wonderful scenery.

Scenario 2: ANYPOV

Kaoruko’s birthday! (Extremely wholesome scenario.)

Scenario 3: ANYPOV

You and Kaoruko and riding the train back home after a long day of sightseeing and taking pictures. (She’s eepy.)

Scenario 4: ANYPOV

Kaoruko helped in baking the cake she wanted but it kinda turned out weird looking. (It’s still good tho.)

Scenario 5: ANYPOV

Date night kinda. You and Kaoruko are going to movie theater to watch something.
creator: Fwuzi
